name: Filing Claims After Leaving Noisy Utah Jobs

mainEntity.name: How to file hearing loss claim after quitting noisy job in Midvale?
mainEntity.text: How to file hearing loss claim after quitting noisy job in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to last employer within 180 days of awareness per Utah Code; file formal comp claim with Utah Labor Commission within 1 year of injury date (last exposure).

suggestedAnswer.text: Post-employment, notify ex-employer promptly; use certified mail. Submit Form 188 to Commission with audiogram. Midvale ex-workers face carrier delays; attorney accelerates approvals, counters denials on causation. Preserve pay stubs for wage loss.[4]
